MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: 24-item self-report; items rated 1 (Very true for me) to 4 (Very false for me). Items 1, 6, 11, 17 are fillers and are not scored.

bisbas_1.Description: A person's family is the most important thing in life.

bisbas_2.Description: Even if something bad is about to happen to me, I rarely experience fear or nervousness.

bisbas_3.Description: I go out of my way to get things I want.

bisbas_4.Description: When I'm doing well at something I love to keep at it.

bisbas_5.Description: I'm always willing to try something new if I think it will be fun.

bisbas_6.Description: How I dress is important to me.

bisbas_7.Description: When I get something I want, I feel excited and energized.

bisbas_8.Description: Criticism or scolding hurts me quite a bit.

bisbas_9.Description: When I want something I usually go all-out to get it.

bisbas_10.Description: I will often do things for no other reason than that they might be fun.

bisbas_11.Description: It's hard for me to find the time to do things such as get a haircut.

bisbas_12.Description: If I see a chance to get something I want I move on it right away.

bisbas_13.Description: I feel pretty worried or upset when I think or know somebody is angry at me.

bisbas_14.Description: When I see an opportunity for something I like I get excited right away.

bisbas_15.Description: I often act on the spur of the moment.

bisbas_16.Description: If I think something unpleasant is going to happen I usually get pretty "worked up."

bisbas_17.Description: I often wonder why people act the way they do.

bisbas_18.Description: When good things happen to me, it affects me strongly.

bisbas_19.Description: I feel worried when I think I have done poorly at something important.

bisbas_20.Description: I crave excitement and new sensations.

bisbas_21.Description: When I go after something I use a "no holds barred" approach.

bisbas_22.Description: I have very few fears compared to my friends.

bisbas_23.Description: It would excite me to win a contest.

bis_score_total.Description: BIS total: items 8,13,16,19,24 reverse-coded (5-x) then summed with items 2,22 (not reversed). Higher = greater behavioral inhibition. n/a if any contributing item is missing.

bas_score_driveTotal.Description: BAS Drive: sum of reverse-coded (5-x) items 3,9,12,21. n/a if any item missing.

bas_score_funTotal.Description: BAS Fun Seeking: sum of reverse-coded (5-x) items 5,10,15,20. n/a if any item missing.

bas_score_rewardTotal.Description: BAS Reward Responsiveness: sum of reverse-coded (5-x) items 4,7,14,18,23. n/a if any item missing.
